title: Warm congratulations to Zeng Shengwen, Chairman of our company, for attending the Fourth Session of the 13th Qinhuangdao CPPCC
contentHtml:
On the morning of January 15, the fourth meeting of the 13th Qinhuangdao Municipal Committee of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference successfully completed all agendas. Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Group, attended the meeting as a member of the CPPCC Committee.

Through the joint efforts of all members, the conference successfully completed all agendas, fully demonstrating the responsibilities of CPPCC members who care about development and people's livelihood, fully demonstrating the vitality of socialist deliberative democracy, and fully embodying the unique role of specialized consultative institutions. It is a conference that unifies thinking, concentrates efforts, unites and encourages, and strives for reality.

After the meeting, Zeng Shengwen of Tianhui Group said: Under the strong leadership of the Qinhuangdao Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China, we are willing to ride on the strong east wind of reform and opening up, conform to the trend of the times of high-quality development, bravely stand on the tide, break the waves, perform wonderful stories on the broad stage of the People's Political Consultative Conference, continue to write the chapter of life, and make new and greater contributions to socialist modernization.
titleZh: 热烈祝贺我公司董事长曾胜文出席政协秦皇岛市第十三届第四次会议
contentHtmlZh:
1月15日上午，中国人民政治协商会议秦皇岛市第十三届委员会第四次会议圆满完成各项议程。天晖集团董事长曾胜文作为市政协委员出席了此次会议。

经过全体委员共同努力，大会圆满完成各项议程，充分展示了政协委员心系发展、情牵民生的担当作为，充分彰显了社会主义协商民主的生机活力，充分体现了专门协商机构的独特作用，是一次统一思想、凝心聚力、团结鼓劲、求实奋进的大会。 　　

会后，天晖集团曾胜文表示：愿在中共秦皇岛市委坚强领导下，乘着改革开放再出发的强劲东风，顺应高质量发展的时代大潮，勇立潮头，破浪前进，在人民政协的宽广舞台上演绎精彩故事，续写人生华章，为社会主义现代化作出新的更大的贡献。
